headline_original: Dbeibah, US Chargé d’Affaires discuss unified development program, economic cooperation
article_snippet: Libyan Prime Minister Abdul Hamid Dbeibah met on Thursday with US Chargé d’Affaires Jeremy Berndt to discuss bilateral cooperation and a range of economic and development issues of mutual interest.

headline_original: European Union backs Structured Dialogue recommendations
article_snippet: The European Union Delegation and the diplomatic missions of EU member states in Libya have welcomed the conclusion of the UN-facilitated Structured Dialogue, praising its recommendations as the outcome of a “Libyan-led and Libyan-owned” process.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant; low_editorial_value:55<60

headline_original: Army chief discusses naval cooperation during French ship visit
article_snippet: Libya’s army chief of staff, Salah al-Din al-Namroush, has discussed boosting naval capabilities with France’s ambassador to Libya, Thierry Vallat, during a visit to Tripoli Naval Base.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant; low_editorial_value:55<60

headline_original: Authorities identify 27 more Storm Daniel victims in Derna
article_snippet: The General Authority for the Search and Identification of Missing Persons says it has identified 27 more victims of Storm Daniel in the city of Derna, following DNA analysis.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant; low_editorial_value:5<60
